content.scenarioHint: 你正在为一场重要会议预订会议室，需要确认是否提供高清摄像头、麦克风和屏幕共享功能，避免现场技术故障。
content.speakerText: Could you confirm if the room has a high-definition camera, a wireless mic, and screen-sharing capability?
content.speakerTextCn: 你能确认一下这个房间是否有高清摄像头、无线话筒和屏幕共享功能吗？
expectedAnswers: Yes, everything’s set up — HD camera, wireless mic, and screen sharing via HDMI and wireless cast.
We have the camera and mic, but screen sharing requires you to connect via laptop — is that okay?
The room supports wireless screen sharing, but we don’t have a dedicated mic — could you bring your own?
I’ll double-check with AV team — give me two minutes to confirm.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确询问了至少三项关键设备（摄像头、话筒、屏幕共享）
语言准确性：语法正确，使用了恰当的设备术语（如 HD camera, wireless mic, screen-sharing）
表达自然度：语气礼貌，符合职场沟通习惯，无中式英语
关键词覆盖：使用了场景关键词如 camera, mic, screen-sharing, set up

content.speakerText: We’re presenting tomorrow — do we need anything special for the tech setup?
content.speakerTextCn: 我们明天要演示，技术设备上需要特别准备什么吗？
expectedAnswers: Just a screen and a wireless presenter — we’ve got those covered.
We’ll need an HDMI cable and a backup laptop in case the main one fails.
Could you check if the room has a sound system too? We’ll need speakers for the audio.
evaluationCriteria: 是否识别并回应了演示场景的核心设备需求
是否使用了至少两个场景关键词（如 screen, presenter, HDMI, speakers）
表达是否清晰、有逻辑，是否主动提出潜在需求
